input.background: As part of a study into the effects of woodland management on bird distribution, 36 woods were surveyed for the presence (P) or absence (A) of long-tailed tits and classified as one of three woodland types: pre-thicket (PT), thicket (T) or high forest (HF).
input.question: Arrange the data in a 3 × 2 contingency table (including row, column and grand totals).

output.answer:
Pre-thicket | Thicket | High forest | Row totals
Present: 7 | 10 | 5 | 22
Absent: 5 | 1 | 8 | 14
Column totals: 12 | 11 | 13 | Grand total: 36

meta_info.book: Using Statistics to Understand the Environment
